locations.name: 圭亚那

locations.name: 巴西

relations.subject: Greater flowerpiercer
relations.evidence: The greater flowerpiercer occurs around the tepuis (flat-topped mountains) that are found in the southeastern part of Venezuela and the adjoining areas of northern Brazil and western Guyana
